flink:position-deletes:v2.notes: Flink supports reading and writing position deletes in both batch and streaming modes

flink:position-deletes:v3.notes: Position deletes supported via Iceberg library V3 support (iceberg-flink-runtime 1.10.x+)

flink:equality-deletes:v2.notes: Flink supports equality deletes via UPSERT mode with primary keys; used for streaming CDC and upsert workloads

flink:equality-deletes:v3.notes: Equality deletes supported via Iceberg library V3 support (iceberg-flink-runtime 1.10.x+)

flink:merge-on-read:v2.notes: Flink supports merge-on-read via streaming upsert mode using equality deletes

flink:merge-on-read:v3.notes: Merge-on-read supported via Iceberg library V3 support including deletion vectors

flink:copy-on-write:v2.notes: Copy-on-write supported via INSERT INTO and INSERT OVERWRITE

flink:copy-on-write:v3.notes: Copy-on-write supported via INSERT INTO and INSERT OVERWRITE with V3 format

flink:schema-evolution:v2.notes: Flink can read tables with evolved schemas, but ALTER TABLE only supports changing table properties — column and partition changes are not supported via Flink DDL
caveats: ALTER TABLE only supports changing table properties; column additions, renames, drops, and reordering not supported via Flink SQL

flink:schema-evolution:v3.notes: Flink can read V3 tables with evolved schemas, but ALTER TABLE only supports changing table properties — column and partition changes are not supported via Flink DDL
caveats: ALTER TABLE only supports changing table properties; column additions, renames, drops, and reordering not supported via Flink SQL

flink:column-default-values:v2.notes: Column default values are a V3 feature

flink:column-default-values:v3.notes: Column default values are a V3 feature; Flink Iceberg integration has not explicitly documented support
caveats: No explicit documentation for Flink support of V3 column default values

flink:nanosecond-timestamps:v2.notes: Nanosecond timestamps are a V3 feature

flink:nanosecond-timestamps:v3.notes: Flink supports nanosecond timestamp precision, matching the full range of Iceberg's timestamp spec (Iceberg 1.11.0, Flink 2.1).

flink:hidden-partitioning:v2.notes: Flink can read and write to tables with hidden partitions created by other engines, but Flink DDL does not support creating tables with transform-based (hidden) partitioning
caveats: Flink DDL PARTITION BY does not support transform functions (e.g., days(), hours(), bucket()); use Spark or another engine to create hidden-partitioned tables

flink:hidden-partitioning:v3.notes: Flink can read and write to V3 tables with hidden partitions created by other engines, but Flink DDL does not support creating tables with transform-based (hidden) partitioning
caveats: Flink DDL PARTITION BY does not support transform functions (e.g., days(), hours(), bucket()); use Spark or another engine to create hidden-partitioned tables

flink:partition-evolution:v2.notes: Partition evolution supported via the Dynamic Sink (Sink V2-based implementation)
caveats: Requires Dynamic Sink (Sink V2-based implementation)

flink:partition-evolution:v3.notes: Partition evolution supported via the Dynamic Sink (Sink V2-based implementation) for V3 tables
caveats: Requires Dynamic Sink (Sink V2-based implementation)

flink:multi-arg-transforms:v2.notes: Multi-argument transforms are a V3 feature

flink:multi-arg-transforms:v3.notes: Multi-argument transforms are a V3 feature; Flink Iceberg integration has not explicitly documented support
caveats: No explicit documentation for Flink support of V3 multi-argument transforms

flink:time-travel:v2.notes: Flink supports time travel via snapshot-id and as-of-timestamp read options in batch mode, plus branch and tag reads via SQL hints
caveats: Uses SQL hint syntax (/*+ OPTIONS('snapshot-id'='...') */) rather than native SQL time travel syntax

flink:time-travel:v3.notes: Time travel supported for V3 tables via snapshot-id, as-of-timestamp, branch, and tag read options
caveats: Uses SQL hint syntax (/*+ OPTIONS('snapshot-id'='...') */) rather than native SQL time travel syntax

flink:table-maintenance:v2.notes: Flink supports the rewrite files action (compaction) but does not support expire_snapshots, remove_orphan_files, or rewrite_manifests — use Spark for full maintenance
caveats: Only rewrite files action available; expire_snapshots, remove_orphan_files, rewrite_manifests not supported

flink:table-maintenance:v3.notes: Flink supports the rewrite files action (compaction) for V3 tables but does not support expire_snapshots, remove_orphan_files, or rewrite_manifests
caveats: Only rewrite files action available; expire_snapshots, remove_orphan_files, rewrite_manifests not supported

flink:branching-tagging:v2.notes: Flink can write to branches via FlinkSink.toBranch() and read from branches/tags via SQL hints, including incremental scan between tags. Cannot create or manage branches/tags via DDL
caveats: Cannot create or manage branches/tags; read and write to existing branches/tags only

flink:branching-tagging:v3.notes: Flink can write to branches via FlinkSink.toBranch() and read from branches/tags via SQL hints for V3 tables. Cannot create or manage branches/tags via DDL
caveats: Cannot create or manage branches/tags; read and write to existing branches/tags only

flink:read-support:v2.notes: Full read support in both batch and streaming modes, including incremental reads from snapshots and FLIP-27 source

flink:read-support:v3.notes: Full read support for V3 tables in both batch and streaming modes via Iceberg library V3 support

flink:write-insert:v2.notes: INSERT INTO supported for both batch and streaming modes; INSERT OVERWRITE supported in batch mode only
caveats: INSERT OVERWRITE is not supported in streaming mode

flink:write-insert:v3.notes: INSERT INTO and INSERT OVERWRITE supported with V3 format; INSERT OVERWRITE is batch-only
caveats: INSERT OVERWRITE is not supported in streaming mode

flink:write-merge-update-delete:v2.notes: Flink supports UPSERT mode via equality deletes (requires V2 format and primary key) but does not support SQL MERGE INTO, UPDATE, or DELETE statements
caveats: No SQL MERGE INTO, UPDATE, or DELETE syntax; uses streaming upsert mode with equality deletes instead
UPSERT requires V2+ format and a PRIMARY KEY defined on the table

flink:write-merge-update-delete:v3.notes: Flink supports UPSERT mode via equality deletes (requires primary key) but does not support SQL MERGE INTO, UPDATE, or DELETE statements
caveats: No SQL MERGE INTO, UPDATE, or DELETE syntax; uses streaming upsert mode with equality deletes instead
UPSERT requires a PRIMARY KEY defined on the table

flink:catalog-integration:v2.notes: Supports built-in catalog types: hive, hadoop, rest, glue, jdbc, nessie, plus custom catalog implementations via catalog-impl

flink:catalog-integration:v3.notes: Supports built-in catalog types: hive, hadoop, rest, glue, jdbc, nessie, plus custom catalog implementations via catalog-impl

flink:hive-metastore:v2.notes: Built-in Hive Metastore catalog support via catalog-type='hive'

flink:hive-metastore:v3.notes: Built-in Hive Metastore catalog support via catalog-type='hive'

flink:aws-glue-catalog:v2.notes: Built-in AWS Glue Catalog support via catalog-type='glue'

flink:aws-glue-catalog:v3.notes: Built-in AWS Glue Catalog support via catalog-type='glue'

flink:rest-catalog:v2.notes: Built-in REST Catalog support via catalog-type='rest'

flink:rest-catalog:v3.notes: Built-in REST Catalog support via catalog-type='rest'

flink:nessie:v2.notes: Built-in Nessie catalog support via catalog-type='nessie'

flink:nessie:v3.notes: Built-in Nessie catalog support via catalog-type='nessie'

flink:polaris:v2.notes: Polaris supported via REST Catalog API (catalog-type='rest')

flink:polaris:v3.notes: Polaris supported via REST Catalog API (catalog-type='rest')

flink:unity-catalog:v2.notes: Can connect to Unity Catalog via REST Catalog API (catalog-type='rest')
caveats: Requires REST Catalog endpoint configuration pointing to Unity Catalog

flink:unity-catalog:v3.notes: Can connect to Unity Catalog via REST Catalog API (catalog-type='rest')
caveats: Requires REST Catalog endpoint configuration pointing to Unity Catalog

flink:hadoop-catalog:v2.notes: Built-in Hadoop catalog support via catalog-type='hadoop'; ships with Hadoop jars by default

flink:hadoop-catalog:v3.notes: Built-in Hadoop catalog support via catalog-type='hadoop'

flink:jdbc-catalog:v2.notes: Built-in JDBC catalog support via catalog-type='jdbc'

flink:jdbc-catalog:v3.notes: Built-in JDBC catalog support via catalog-type='jdbc'

flink:table-creation:v2.notes: Flink supports creating Iceberg tables via Flink SQL DDL with CREATE TABLE, CREATE TABLE LIKE, and PARTITIONED BY (identity columns only)
caveats: Hidden partitioning (transform functions) not supported in DDL; only identity partition columns

flink:table-creation:v3.notes: Flink supports creating V3 Iceberg tables via Flink SQL DDL (set format-version='3' in WITH clause)
caveats: Hidden partitioning (transform functions) not supported in DDL; only identity partition columns

flink:variant-type:v2.notes: Variant Type is a V3 feature

flink:variant-type:v3.notes: Variant type is supported in Flink 2.1 (Iceberg 1.11.0), enabling semi-structured data ingestion and processing in Flink pipelines. Shredded Variant reads/writes are not yet documented.
caveats: Shredded Variant support is not yet documented for Flink

flink:shredded-variant:v2.notes: Shredded Variant is a V3 feature

flink:shredded-variant:v3.notes: OSS Flink V3 shredded variant support is not yet documented

flink:geometry-type:v2.notes: Geometry Type is a V3 feature

flink:geometry-type:v3.notes: OSS Flink V3 geometry type support is not yet documented

flink:lineage:v3.notes: Flink provides row lineage readers for _row_id and _last_updated_sequence_number, with row lineage preserved through RewriteDataFiles compaction (Iceberg 1.11.0).

flink:statistics:v2.notes: Flink Iceberg connector writes column statistics to manifest files by default via the standard Iceberg write path. Uses statistics for scan planning during reads in both batch and streaming modes.

flink:statistics:v3.notes: Column statistics supported for V3 tables via iceberg-flink-runtime

flink:bloom-filters:v2.notes: Bloom filter support requires further testing to confirm
caveats: Needs further testing to confirm support

flink:bloom-filters:v3.notes: Bloom filter support requires further testing to confirm
caveats: Needs further testing to confirm support

flink:type-promotion:v2.notes: Flink supports type widening for Iceberg tables

flink:type-promotion:v3.notes: Flink supports type widening for Iceberg V3 tables

flink:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v2.notes: Flink Iceberg connector supports REST catalog. Configure with catalog-type=rest and the Horizon Catalog endpoint URI.

flink:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v3.notes: V3 support depends on iceberg-flink-runtime version (1.7.0+ recommended). REST catalog connectivity unchanged.
caveats: Requires iceberg-flink-runtime 1.7.0+ for V3 table support

flink:deletion-vectors:v2.notes: Deletion vectors are a V3 feature; not applicable to Iceberg V2

flink:deletion-vectors:v3.notes: The Flink Dynamic Sink supports Iceberg V3 deletion vectors, enabling efficient row-level deletes without rewriting data files (Iceberg 1.11.0).
